description: P1 Phase A: bridge_quality / alignment_precision conditions. 5 conditions, pool=70 C2 from run_018, T_high=0.75.

conditions.C2_baseline: First 30 from C2 pool (no filter), ordered by ID

note_underpowered: C2_alignment_precision, C2_novelty_ceiling, and C2_combined may have N < 30 due to structural constraints of the run_018 pool. C2_novelty_ceiling: pool mean combined_novelty = 0.833 > T_high=0.75; only ~8/70 hypotheses qualify.

success_criteria.go_phase_b: At least one filtered condition achieves investigability ≥ 0.95
success_criteria.no_go: All conditions investigability ≤ 0.92 → structural KG problem
